title: EasyAbroad
description: Run your favorite Android apps on HarmonyOS NEXT without the usual hassle. EasyAbroad makes it simple to bridge the gap and access apps that aren’t officially available.

title: DroiTong
description: A practical all-in-one app hub for HarmonyOS NEXT. Discover, download, and manage a wide range of third-party apps in one place, with updates handled for you.

title: NEXT Store
description: A simple platform to explore and share HarmonyOS NEXT apps. Great for discovering new projects and seeing what others are building.

title: Remy
description: Capture moments in 3D instead of flat photos or videos. Remy lets you record real spaces and revisit them later, moving around and experiencing them as if you were there again.
